zh.Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾布
zh.Caen, Calvados, Normandy, France: 法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱
zh.lifeSummary: 當Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington於1060年出生在英國坎布利其爾布時，他的父親Ranulph de Peverel41歲，母親Maude 'Athelida'27歲。他和Elise Adeliza de Lascelles至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1130年在英國坎布利其爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国英格兰坎布利其爾布
zh-hans.Caen, Calvados, Normandy, France: 法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington于1060年出生在英国坎布利其爾布时，他的父亲Ranulph de Peverel41岁，母亲Maude 'Athelida'27岁。他和Elise Adeliza de Lascelles至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1130年在英国坎布利其爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Pagan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern spelling of Aodhagán, a diminutive form of Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington was born in 1060, in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Ranulph de Peverel, was 41 and his mother, Maude 'Athelida', was 27. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Elise Adeliza de Lascelles. He died in 1130, in Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington est né en 1060, à Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Ranulph de Peverel, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Maude 'Athelida', avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Elise Adeliza de Lascelles. Il est décédé en 1130, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington 1060 in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph de Peverel 41 und seine Mutter Maude 'Athelida' 27. Er hatte mit Elise Adeliza de Lascelles mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1130 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington è nato il nel 1060 nel Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Ranulph de Peverel, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Maude 'Athelida', aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Elise Adeliza de Lascelles. Morì nel 1130, nel Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittingtonが1060年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボウルンで生まれた時，父Ranulph de Peverelは41歳，母Maude 'Athelida'は27歳であった。彼はElise Adeliza de Lascellesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1130年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington(이)가 1060년 영국 캄브리지실르 부른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph de Peverel(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude 'Athelida'(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Elise Adeliza de Lascelles(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1130년 영국 캄브리지실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England: Bourn, Caer Grawnt, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington nasceu em 1060, em Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulph de Peverel, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Maude 'Athelida', tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Elise Adeliza de Lascelles. Ele faleceu em 1130, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington родился в 1060 г. в местности бурн, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ranulph de Peverel было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Maude 'Athelida', 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Elise Adeliza de Lascelles. Он умер в 1130 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington nació en 1060, en Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulph de Peverel, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Maude 'Athelida', tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Elise Adeliza de Lascelles. Murió en 1130, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
